title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · Type-System Trace: Property Fuzz Parser
summary: Tests call live dependencies, assert only status 200, share mutable state, never vary malformed inputs, and mistake mocks or coverage for behavioral proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts property fuzz parser increment in layered deterministic server verification matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Generate bounded valid and invalid values for parsers, routes, canonicalization, authorization, pagination, and idempotency while shrinking reproducible counterexamples.
Verify runtime requests and responses against schemas and consumer cases while detecting undocumented statuses, fields, nullability, security, and behavioral drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Property Fuzz Parser · Theory Property Fuzz Parser
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 1279 in a public incident API behind one regional edge proxy. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on layered domain, handler, fuzz, and resource-lifecycle evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then abort during a dependency phase and preserve cleanup plus response ownership. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
